instruction:
Let $C=f(q)=350+0.2 q$ give the cost in dollars to manufacture $q$ kg of a chemical. a) Which of the following statement(s) correctly explain the meaning of $f^{-1}(C)$? Check all that apply. [ANS] A. The number of kgs. of chemical that can be manufactured for each 1 dollar spent.  B. The cost of manufacturing $C$ kgs. the chemical.  C. The number of kgs. of the chemical someone can purchase with $C$ dollars.  D. The cost of manufacturing one kg. of the chemical.  E. The number of kgs. of the chemical that can be manufactured with $C$ dollars.  F. None of the above
(b) Find a formula for $f^{-1}(C)=$ [ANS]
